name: data-pipeline
description: Reference colony for a Python data-engineering and ML project. Demonstrates SkDD skills for dataset onboarding, ETL pipeline scaffolding, experiment logging, data quality gates, and safe historical backfills.

skills.name: dataset-onboard
skills.description: Onboard a new raw dataset: schema sniff, profiling notebook, ingestion job, data dictionary entry.

skills.name: pipeline-stage
skills.description: Scaffold a new transform stage with idempotency, schema contract, and tests.

skills.name: experiment-log
skills.description: Record a training run: params, metrics, artifacts; append to experiments ledger.

skills.name: data-quality-gate
skills.description: Add or extend data validation checks when a pipeline breaks on bad data.

skills.name: backfill-runbook
skills.description: Safe historical backfill: scope, dry-run, chunked execution, verification queries.
